title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 6: The Yoga of Meditation
description: Chapter 6 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna teaches the practice of meditation: sit firm, control the mind, and fix it on the Self.
introduction: Chapter 6 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna teaches the practice of meditation: sit firm, control the mind, and fix it on the Self.

translation.text: For one who has conquered the mind, the mind is the best of friends; but for one who has failed to do so, the mind is the greatest enemy.
